tips_en: Start with the Unified Multimodal Models paper (Paper 2) to understand the theoretical framework of pseudo-unification, then read OmniShow (Paper 1) as a concrete application achieving true unification through contextual prediction—both papers share the theme of multimodality integration. CodeTracer (Paper 3) is more specialized but connects to the others in analyzing model behavior; it's recommended for readers working on LLM debugging or agent systems.
tips_zh: 建议先读统一多模态模型论文（论文2）以理解伪统一的理论框架，再读OmniShow（论文1）作为通过上下文预测实现真正统一的实践案例——两篇论文都涉及多模态融合主题。CodeTracer（论文3）更为专精，但与前两篇在模型行为分析方面有共通之处，适合从事LLM调试或Agent系统研究的读者。
